item.headline: General Partner at Page One Ventures
item.about:
Founder & General Partner, Page One Ventures.

Made in California.

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: General Partner at Page One Ventures

experience.description: Page One Ventures is an early-stage venture firm centered in Silicon Valley. We leverage deep partnerships with a global network of iconic institutions and patient capital to create strategic advantages for the companies we work with.  We invest in software transforming existing markets and deep technology creating new markets.   We believe the rise of technology companies is still at its inception.  We focus on seed stage and invest early to align with exceptional founders. Through previous funds our Partners have invested in 50+ companies who have since raised over $1.8B in follow on financing and have grown to a collective enterprise value of $20B+.
Invested as Venture Partner at Oryx Ventures.

In 2015, I drove the formation and led deployment of the first Rising Tide (RT) pooled fund as a Founding Managing Member of the GP.  I brought together some of the preeminent tech leaders of the past thirty years and other strategic partners and family offices, as Limited Partners. We launched our second pooled fund 18 months later; it was double the size and I brought in our first institutional investors (pooled) there.

I managed seed investing at RT, focusing on expanding and leveraging the Silicon Valley ecosystem across accelerators, universities, corporate partners, angel investors, technical experts, and venture capital funds to: source and identify the most innovative startups; invest in the most competitive deals; help entrepreneurs identify strategic paths to market; and accelerate their growth through business development and strategic partnership, particularly internationally. I made over 55 investments.

Select investments (and co-investors/acquirers): Alice Technologies (Future Ventures, Lightspeed), Apama Medical (acq by Boston Scientific for $300M), Armory (Bain Capital Ventures, Crosslink), Astranis (Andreessen Horowitz A16Z, Lux Capital, Felicis), Ayar Labs (Playground Global, Founders Fund), Blockstack (Union Square Ventures, Foundation Capital, Harvard Endowment), Brave (Founders Fund), Castle (First Round Capital, Index Ventures, F-Prime), Dapper Labs (USV, A16Z, Venrock), Datatron (Stanford StartX), Evonetix (Data Collective), EXO Imaging (BOLD Capital Partners, Intel Capital, Applied Ventures), Fly.io (Fuel Capital, Initialized Capital), Ledger Investing (Accel Partners, MassMutual Ventures, SignalFire), Metawave  (Khosla Ventures, Toyota, Hyundai), OneChronos (Addition), Quilt Data (Vertex Ventures, DCVC), TAE Health (Artis Ventures, Goldman Sachs), Teampay (Tribe Capital), Voicea (acquired by Cisco for $120M)

education.description:
Identified.com's Top 10 Most Connected Grads in Southern California: http://blog.identified.com/2012/05/the-top-10-most-connected-grads-in-southern-california.html

Undergraduate Researcher: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA): Conducted independent research at La Jolla, CA lab.  Research was cited by PhD students.  Would have been published but I got distracted by other projects after it was completed. 

Undergraduate Internship: Aga Khan Agency for Microfinance (AKAM), part of the AKDN.  Presented summer project to AK Board in Geneva. Got familiar with local entrepreneurs in the most historic neighborhoods in Cairo, Egypt, pre Arab Spring.
education.insights: Activities and societies: Environmental Systems minor, International House, Intramural Basketball, Soccer, Football
Activities and societies: Varsity basketball, reached California state quarterfinals

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 28, 2018, Doug worked with Mo but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: Mo was extremely helpful in the Bridge and Series A investment rounds at Eridan. He introduced us to the eventual lead investor for the Series A and catalyzed a healthy participation in the Bridge that gave us the time to put together a strong investor base for the A. He's knowledgable, personable, and has a strong network to leverage for growth and investment.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 25, 2018, Arun worked with Mo but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: Extremely dedicated, smart and entrepreneur friendly investor. Been a pleasure to work with!

Mohammad is an absolute star. He is an organized, creative, and passionate multi-tasker with a seemingly inexhaustible supply of energy and positive spirit. He spent the summer with us, a small team of ultra-busy finance guys, and was able to quickly ramp up and internalize the organization's mission, goals, and objectives. His contributions in codifying the TechWadi handbook, managing our social media presence, and formalizing key processes have been key to our continued growth and success. His contributions to the startups we've worked with have been on-the-money, and his ability to represent the organization to partners and service providers is exceptional. I'm looking forward to continuing to work with him this year as he takes a leadership role in pushing the organization to greater heights.
